calendar.matters:
Petition For Judges Signature For Approval To Record Notice Of Lis Pendens
Off Calendar Mar-12-2025 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Joan Lynn Foggy, Petitioner.
Nicole S. Dunn, specially appearing for the Ahmed Alomari as Trustee of the Alomari Family Trust (via CourtCall).

Ms. Foggy informed the court that she had recorded a lis pendens against the property and sought permission to reinstate it. She stated that she had previously engaged legal counsel regarding the matter and intended to secure financing for the property.
The court explained that a lis pendens is only applicable when there is pending litigation concerning the property. As the estate was closed in 2022 through an order approving final distribution, no such litigation exists. Accordingly, the court advised Ms. Foggy that a lis pendens cannot be recorded in this matter.

Ms. Foggy acknowledged the ruling and stated that she intends to sue the title company regarding the property.

The court denied the Petition for Approval to Record Notice of Lis Pendens.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

Ms. Foggy advises of her appearance this morning to object and mentions that she was not aware of documents with her electronic signature that were submitted to the court for filing. Ms. Foggy advises that she can file her objections within the next two weeks.

After additional discussion, the matter is continued to Oct-10-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. Ms. Foggy's objections must be filed with the court on or before Sep-26-2022 and responses thereon must be filed on or before Oct-03-2022.
